title: auricula-ursi auricula subsp. hungarica
intro: Auricula-ursi auricula subsp. hungarica, also known as bearberry, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub that belongs to the heath family. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and astringent qualities, which make it effective in treating urinary tract infections and other conditions. The health benefits of bearberry include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of cystitis and urethritis, and even help manage conditions such as kidney stones and incontinence. Bearberry can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or dried herb, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to support the health of the urinary tract system.
